message:
fix: Add ScriptLanguage::Go to exhaustive match statements

The Go variant was added to ScriptLanguage enum but match statements
in ast_matcher.rs, evaluator.rs, and cli.rs were not updated,
causing compilation errors about non-exhaustive patterns.

Changes:
- ast_matcher.rs: Map Go to SupportLang::Go for ast-grep
- evaluator.rs: Add "go" string for heredoc denial reasons
- cli.rs: Add "go" label for language display

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -356,6 +356,7 @@ const fn script_language_to_ast_lang(lang: ScriptLanguage) -> Option<SupportLang
         ScriptLanguage::TypeScript => Some(SupportLang::TypeScript),
         ScriptLanguage::Ruby => Some(SupportLang::Ruby),
         ScriptLanguage::Bash => Some(SupportLang::Bash),
+        ScriptLanguage::Go => Some(SupportLang::Go),
         ScriptLanguage::Perl | ScriptLanguage::Unknown => None,
     }
 }
